# nirvana_instance_types (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nirvana_instance_types" "example_instance_types" {

}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `chipset` (String)
- `created_at` (String) When the Instance Type was created.
- `family` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `memory_gb` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `region` (String) Region the resource is in.
Available values: "us-sva-1", "us-sva-2", "us-chi-1", "us-wdc-1".
- `series` (String)
- `updated_at` (String) When the Instance Type was updated.
- `vcpu` (Number)
